quote: The Art of Peace begins with you. – Morihei Ueshiba
fact: Months that begin on a Sunday will always have a "Friday the 13th."
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke:
A weasel walks into a bar. The bartender says, "Wow, I've never served a weasel before. What can I get for you?"
"Pop," goes the weasel.
